creator: me@janh.de
text:
I have not really solved my problem in http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=135161 -- but I am producing further updates.

This should be committed together with the update to gwenhywfar-3.9.0 in the previous problem report: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=135914

finance/gnucash needs a shared library version bump.

Fix: With the patch, aqbanking-4.1.0 builds, installs, and a package can be created.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: aqbanking-4.0.0 to 4.1.0
